final_decision.exact_quote: You can update the name on your certificate only once per account.
final_decision.response: You can update the name on your certificate only once per account. When you update your name, the change applies to all your certificates. After you update it, you cannot change it again. To update the name on your certificate, open your certificate page, enter the name you want to display in the Full Name field, click Regenerate Certificate, and then confirm the update.
